title: HSA's Abhirup Dasgupta sets up independent practice
description: Abhirup Dasgupta has quit HSA Advocates to set up his own independent chambers.Dasgupta is a 2008 alumnus of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha UniversityWith 17 years of experience, Dasgupta specialises in Insolvency & Bankruptcy Litigation, Commercial Litigation, Banking and Finance Litigation and Oppression and Mismanagement cases. He regularly represents several lenders, promoters, Resolution Professionals, acquirers and other stakeholders before NCLT, NCLAT, High Court and Supreme Court.Das
